name: ContractIQ Sentinel
description: AI-Powered Enterprise Contract Intelligence Platform developed as part of the AICTE IBM SkillsBuild Internship. The platform automates contract analysis using IBM watsonx Orchestrate and IBM Granite models to identify clause deviations, assess risks, generate executive summaries, and produce enterprise-ready Excel reports.

project.title: ContractIQ Sentinel – AI Powered Enterprise Contract Intelligence Platform
